summary: Completed comprehensive testing of JARVIS V2 features: Face verification login and VSCode extension API. All 36 backend tests passed (17 original + 19 new). All frontend flows tested successfully including camera offline fallback, login, dashboard, and logout.
critical_code_review_comments: VSCode extension uses hardcoded default serverUrl 'http://localhost:8001' - should use configuration or environment variable
Face enrollment stores histogram in MongoDB which is good for persistence, but histogram comparison may not be robust for real-world face recognition
test_credentials: No credentials needed - biometric login auto-authenticates. Camera offline fallback shows 'Bypass Authentication' button.
seed_data_creation: None required - app uses session-based auth
context_for_next_testing_agent: V2 features tested: 1) Face verification at login - uses OpenCV Haar cascade, sends base64 webcam frame, compares against enrolled face histogram. Without enrolled face or camera, grants access via fallback. 2) VSCode extension API - /api/vscode/action supports complete, explain, fix, refactor, generate, chat actions. /api/vscode/status returns capabilities. All endpoints require X-JARVIS-TOKEN header. VSCode extension at /app/vscode-extension/ implements all commands with sidebar chat.

face_verification_login.login_without_image: PASS - Returns success with face_detected=false, confidence=0.0
face_verification_login.login_with_blank_image: PASS - Returns success=false, 'No face detected' message
face_verification_login.login_with_synthetic_face: PASS - Processes image, returns face detection result
face_verification_login.login_with_invalid_base64: PASS - Falls back to biometric_fallback mode

frontend_camera_fallback.camera_offline_display: PASS - Shows 'CAMERA OFFLINE' with warning icon
frontend_camera_fallback.bypass_authentication_button: PASS - Shows 'Bypass Authentication' when camera offline
frontend_camera_fallback.login_flow_without_camera: PASS - Successfully logs in and redirects to dashboard

features_tested.dashboard_after_login: PASS - All components load: Calendar, System Diagnostics, Weather, Terminal, Arc Reactor, Bottom Dock
